extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR won UAE Tour Stage 7 atop Jebel Hafeet after ALMEIDA's late attack forced YATES to chase, letting POGACAR sit on his wheel into the sprint finish.
tactical_patterns: ALMEIDA attacked for POGACAR with under 2km remaining, forcing YATES to close while POGACAR sat on for free.
UAE Emirates worked through CONRAD then MAJKA high on climb, saving POGACAR completely until final 2km explosion.
BILBAO dragged ALMEIDA up to YATES/POGACAR group, inadvertently gifting UAE domestique a tow to final selection.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Won both summit finishes showing UAE's tactical depth allows him to repeatedly sit wheels then outsprint fresh.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Shook head demanding POGACAR take pulls in final 2km but lacked acceleration to punish refusal tactically.
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: positive: Strong enough to attack with 2km left while wearing white jersey, proving UAE has two-pronged GC weapon.
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: neutral: Led chase to bridge but faded final 2km, bridging effort may have cost podium finish.
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafal: positive: Did extended high-altitude pacing work suggesting UAE can afford burning strong climber before finale.
rider_signals.PLAAPP Lucas: positive: Finished 5th on Hafeet climb as young Australian, unexpected result on 11% gradients.
